hb1ab1af2g3e7eg4353ga2b8g5481349d25fd: The road to Baldur's Gate is a long one. It'll take these folks weeks to make it there on foot.
h5192e899gf5c6g4a03g8509g7afa5e87fa3a: If they make it. They're slow, vulnerable. Half or more will die long before Basilisk Gate.
h0981600cg3c10g4766g98acg827ad4a71d6b: Doesn't seem to trouble you a jot.
haf34d313gac43g4389g8c1egfc0da02680e2: What good would it do for me to be troubled? We can't save them all.
